series_metadata.series_description: Cases of: (1) Unfounded complaints dismissed without hearing (2) Cases unsubstantiated in hearing (3) Substantiated complaints against staff of Long Term Care Facilities

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Expunge unfounded and unsubstan- tiated complaint files and destroy on a quarterly basis. Retain substantiated cases 10 years then refer to archive review; destroy if of no archival value., Paper: Archives
